title: TextDiff
description: The full line-level diff of a buffer against its on-disk counterpart.

changed.description: True when the buffer differs from disk (i.e. at least one hunk).

path.description: Workspace-relative path of the file being compared.

DiffHunk.description:
One contiguous block of difference between the on-disk file and the buffer.

`old_start`/`old_lines` index the on-disk file; `new_start`/`new_lines` index the buffer. Line numbers are 1-based; a zero `*_lines` count with a `*_start` pointing at the insertion/deletion site is used for pure additions/removals (matching unified-diff conventions).

lines.description: The changed lines, each prefixed with `-` (removed from disk) or `+` (added in the buffer). Removed lines precede added lines within a hunk.

DiffHunkKind.description: The nature of a single diff hunk relative to the on-disk (old) file.

oneOf.description: Only new lines were introduced (no old lines removed).
Only old lines were dropped (no new lines introduced).
Old lines were replaced by new lines.
